message:
chore: gitignore ephemeral one-off refactoring scripts

Add apply_fix.py, fix_mut.py, fix_mut2.py, refactor_ternary.py to
.gitignore — these are agent-generated throwaway scripts used for
automated refactoring passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -77,3 +77,9 @@ __pycache__/
 
 # Beads issue tracker history backups
 .beads/.br_history/
+
+# Ephemeral one-off refactoring scripts (agent-generated)
+apply_fix.py
+fix_mut.py
+fix_mut2.py
+refactor_ternary.py
